name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program
amountDetail: Tuition + living stipend + airfare + health insurance
eligibility: Non-US citizens with a bachelor's degree and strong academic record
description: The US government's flagship international exchange program. Full funding for graduate study, advanced research, or teaching in the United States.

name: Helmut Schmidt Programme (DAAD)
eligibility: Young professionals with 2+ years work experience from developing countries
description: Named after former German Chancellor Helmut Schmidt. Targets future leaders from developing and emerging countries for postgraduate studies in public policy and related fields in Germany.

name: DAAD Development-Related Postgraduate Courses
eligibility: Graduates from developing countries with 2+ years work experience
description: DAAD scholarships for postgraduate studies in development-related courses in Germany.

name: Chevening Scholarship
amountDetail: Tuition + living allowance + airfare + visa fees
eligibility: Citizens of Chevening-eligible countries with 2+ years work experience
description: UK government's global scholarship for future leaders. Full funding for one-year Master's at any UK university.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degrees
eligibility: Any nationality, bachelor's degree required
description: EU-funded scholarships for outstanding students worldwide. Study joint Master's programs across 2-3 European countries.

name: Stipendium Hungaricum Scholarship
eligibility: Citizens of partner countries (100+ countries), under 45
description: Hungary's flagship scholarship program for international students. One of the largest scholarship programs in Europe.

name: Türkiye Scholarships (Türkiye Bursları)
amountDetail: Monthly stipend + accommodation + tuition + health insurance
eligibility: Non-Turkish citizens, age requirements vary by level
description: Turkey's comprehensive government scholarship for international students.

name: Swedish Institute Scholarships (SISGP)
eligibility: Citizens of eligible countries with 3+ years work experience
description: For future global leaders. Full scholarship for a Master's in Sweden.

name: Swiss Government Excellence Scholarships
eligibility: Artists, researchers, and postgraduate students from partner countries
description: The Swiss Confederation awards excellence scholarships to foreign scholars and artists.

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarship
eligibility: Non-UK citizens applying to Cambridge
description: Funded by Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation. One of the most prestigious scholarships globally.

name: Clarendon Scholarship (Oxford)
eligibility: All nationalities — awarded to the most academically excellent Oxford applicants
description: Oxford's flagship graduate scholarship. Awarded to the brightest students from any background.

name: Rhodes Scholarship
eligibility: Citizens of eligible countries, strong academics, leadership, character
description: The world's oldest and most prestigious international scholarship (est. 1902).

name: Commonwealth Scholarship and Fellowship Plan
amountDetail: Tuition + living allowance + airfare + thesis grant
eligibility: Citizens of Commonwealth countries
description: UK government funded scholarships for citizens of Commonwealth countries focusing on development impact.

name: Japanese Government (MEXT) Scholarship
eligibility: Citizens of countries with diplomatic relations with Japan
description: Japanese Ministry of Education scholarship. One of the most comprehensive government scholarships available.

name: Global Korea Scholarship (GKS/KGSP)
eligibility: Citizens of eligible countries, under 25 (BS), under 40 (postgrad)
description: South Korean government scholarship. Includes a full Korean language year before degree.

name: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC)
eligibility: Non-Chinese citizens, healthy, under specified ages
description: Chinese government scholarship administered by China Scholarship Council.

name: Taiwan ICDF International Higher Education Scholarship
eligibility: Citizens of ICDF partner countries, under 40 for postgrad
description: Taiwan's development cooperation scholarship. Study at leading Taiwanese universities.

name: Australia Awards Scholarships
amountDetail: Full tuition + living allowance + airfare + health cover
eligibility: Citizens of eligible Indo-Pacific and African countries
description: Australian government scholarships for people from developing countries.

name: Knight-Hennessy Scholars Program
amountDetail: Full tuition + stipend + travel + enrichment funds
eligibility: Admitted to Stanford graduate program, any nationality
description: Up to 100 scholars per year from around the world admitted to any Stanford graduate program.

name: Harvard University Need-Based Financial Aid
eligibility: All admitted students regardless of nationality — need-based
description: Harvard meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted students worldwide.

name: ETH Zurich Excellence Scholarship
eligibility: Excellent external applicants to ETH Zurich Master's programs
description: ETH Zurich's most prestigious scholarship for outstanding students worldwide.

name: EPFL Excellence Fellowship
eligibility: Top-ranked international applicants admitted to EPFL Master's
description: EPFL consistently ranks top 15 globally.

name: Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarships
eligibility: Canadian and international students in doctoral programs at Canadian universities
description: Canada's most prestigious doctoral scholarship.

name: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program
amountDetail: Full tuition + room/board + travel + living expenses
eligibility: Academically talented students from Sub-Saharan Africa with financial need
description: Full scholarships for talented African students to study at leading universities globally.

name: Aga Khan Foundation International Scholarship
eligibility: Citizens of developing countries where AKF operates, demonstrated financial need
description: AKF provides scholarships for exceptional students from developing countries with no other means of financing.

name: Eiffel Excellence Scholarship (France)
eligibility: International students nominated by French institution, under 30 (Master's), under 35 (PhD)
description: French Ministry of Foreign Affairs program attracting top international students to France's most prestigious institutions.

name: Alexander von Humboldt Research Fellowship
eligibility: Postdoctoral researchers under 40 with outstanding research record
description: One of the world's most prestigious research fellowships.

name: Max Planck IMPRS PhD Fellowships
eligibility: Excellent Master's graduates worldwide
description: International Max Planck Research Schools offer structured PhD programs at Germany's premier research institution.

name: NUS Research Scholarship
deadline: Varies (Nov-Jan for Aug, May-Jun for Jan intake)
eligibility: Outstanding international graduates, all nationalities
description: NUS is Asia's top-ranked university (QS #8 globally).

name: KAUST Fellowship
university: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology
eligibility: Outstanding international students in STEM, any nationality
description: KAUST is a world-class research university on the Red Sea coast. Every admitted student receives the KAUST Fellowship.

name: TU Delft Excellence Scholarship (DSES)
eligibility: Outstanding non-EEA students applying to TU Delft MSc programs
description: TU Delft is Europe's top engineering university (#14 globally).

name: Leiden Excellence Scholarship (LExS)
eligibility: Non-EEA students applying to English-taught Leiden Master's programs
description: Leiden University (est. 1575, Netherlands' oldest) merit scholarships.

name: Rotary Peace Fellowship
amountDetail: Full tuition + living expenses + travel + internship
eligibility: Professionals with 3+ years experience in peace/conflict work
description: Rotary International funds master's degrees at partner universities for peace and conflict prevention professionals.

name: Wageningen University Excellence Scholarship (WU-ES)
eligibility: Top non-EEA students, GPA top 10%
description: Wageningen is #1 globally for Agriculture & Forestry.

name: KU Leuven Solidarity Fund Scholarship
eligibility: Students from developing countries with financial need and academic excellence
description: KU Leuven (Belgium's top university, est. 1425) Solidarity Fund.

name: University of Bologna Study Grants
eligibility: Non-EU students admitted to Bologna Master's programs
description: The University of Bologna (founded 1088 — the world's oldest university) offers study grants.

name: Orange Knowledge Programme (OKP)
eligibility: Mid-career professionals from eligible developing countries, nominated by employer
description: Dutch government scholarship for professionals from developing countries.

name: Russian Government Scholarship (Rossotrudnichestvo)
eligibility: Foreign citizens from countries with diplomatic relations with Russia
description: Russian government scholarship for international students to study at top Russian universities.

name: Islamic Development Bank (IsDB) Scholarship
eligibility: Citizens of IsDB member countries with academic excellence
description: IsDB scholarships for students from Islamic Development Bank member countries (57 countries).

name: Visegrad Fund Scholarships
eligibility: Citizens of V4 countries and Western Balkans studying in V4
description: Visegrad Fund supports student mobility across Central European countries.

name: OFID Scholarship Award
eligibility: Citizens of developing countries admitted to any reputable graduate program
description: OPEC Fund for International Development scholarship for students from developing countries.

name: Banach Programme (Poland)
eligibility: Citizens of developing/transition economies, nominated by Polish Embassy
description: Named after mathematician Stefan Banach, this Polish government program offers full funding.

name: OAS Academic Scholarships
eligibility: Citizens of OAS member states (35 countries in the Americas)
description: Organization of American States scholarships for citizens of member states.

name: African Union Scholarships (AUC-TWAS)
eligibility: African Union member state citizens studying in Africa
description: African Union Commission and TWAS scholarship for African students.

name: Norwegian Government Quota Scheme
amountDetail: Loans and grants from Norwegian State Educational Loan Fund
eligibility: Students from developing countries and quota partner countries
description: Norway's quota scheme allows students from developing countries to study at Norwegian universities.
benefits: Loans and grants on equal terms with Norwegian students

name: Korean University Scholarships (KAIST, SNU, POSTECH)
eligibility: International students admitted to Korean research universities
description: Top Korean universities (KAIST, POSTECH, SNU, Yonsei) offer their own scholarships.

name: Finnish Universities Scholarships (Non-EU Students)
eligibility: Non-EU/EEA students applying to Finnish Master's programs
description: Finnish universities offer scholarships to non-EU/EEA students.

name: NSF Graduate Research Fellowship (USA)
eligibility: US citizens, nationals, and permanent residents only
description: NSF's oldest and most prestigious STEM fellowship.

name: Manaaki New Zealand Scholarships
eligibility: Pacific nations citizens, some Asian and Latin American countries
description: New Zealand government flagship scholarship. Focus on Pacific nations and key development partners.
